class.name: FestivalWeather
class.brief_description: Morning weather, rolled at the start of every run.
class.description: Weather is randomized each run so repeated runs are never perfectly identical. It feeds NPC schedule variants and interaction gates. Registered as the [code]FestivalWeather[/code] singleton.

signal.name: weather_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the weather value changes.

constants.constant: Rain, which can move NPCs indoors and change access.
